title: Supply/Demand Pricing
description: Prices and availability emerge from supply and demand dynamics. As goods are sold in a city, prices drop. As goods are bought, prices rise. This creates dynamic markets that change based on player and competitor actions.
definition-of-done: Dynamic pricing based on supply/demand. Buying increases prices, selling decreases. Price changes persist across turns. Market equilibrium over time.
testing-plan: Verify buying raises prices. Test selling lowers prices. Verify persistence across turns. Test equilibrium recovery.
